# YRWA Time Series Modeling & Forecasting


```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}

library(forecast)
library(Kendall)
library(tseries)
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(cowplot)
library(lubridate)
library(ggplot2)
library(smooth)
library(zoo)
library(kableExtra)
library(tidyr)

```

```{r}

```
